title: Peppa Pig Toy Cash Register Set | Pretend Shopping Play Money Machine & Grocery Food Playset For Boys and Girls
features: GREAT PRETEND SHOPPING - Kids will love playing with the official Peppa Pig Cash Register, packed with all the usual checkout features. Including a Peppa bank card with Contactless beep, fake money, a working calculator and cardboard food products.

PLAY WITH FRIENDS - The HTI Peppa Pig Cash Register contains all the accessories kids need to enjoy shopping fun with their friends or family. The scanning action prompts a beep from the register and the calculator can be used to total up the cost of the shopping. Using the Peppa Pig bank card or cash, simply pay for the goods and be on your way!

IMAGINATIVE FUN - The Peppa Pig Cash Register encourages imaginative and creative play, social interaction and strengthens communication and numerical skills. Requires batteries to be operated to the full potential.

PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS: Contains 1x Peppa Pig Cash Register and. Requires batteries: 2 AAA. Please note: batteries are NOT included. Approx dimensions: 16 x 22 x 13cm. Not suitable for children under 3 years.

CE MARKED UK SELLER SAFE TO PLAY. It's made from safe, non-toxic ingredients. All our products are tested to the highest UK CE standard to ensure the safety of your children; please be careful when comparing with others.
